Data tells the truth only to those who learn how to listen to it quietly.
I was born among the olive groves of Maremma and fell in love with numbers in a physics
classroom in Pisa; since then I have spent nine years helping companies hear what their
customers were already telling them, one query at a time.
Andrea Magazzini
Via Brera 14, 20121 Milano, Italia
+39 348 226 7741 | andrea.magazzini@outlook.it
linkedin.com/in/andreamagazzini
Working Experiences
Senior Data Analyst — Satispay, Milano
Mar 2021 - Present
• Built the merchant churn early-warning model in Python (scikit-learn), cutting monthly merchant churn from 3.1% to 2.2%
• Designed the company-wide KPI layer in dbt and BigQuery, now feeding more than 40 Looker dashboards
• Ran 25 pricing and onboarding A/B tests per year together with product managers and designers
• Mentored two junior analysts through their first end-to-end analyses and presentations to the leadership team
Data Analyst — Mediaset Infinity, Cologno Monzese
Jun 2017 - Feb 2021
• Analysed streaming behaviour of 6 million registered users to shape the content acquisition plan
• Automated the weekly audience report with Airflow and Python, saving the team 10 hours every week
• Segmented subscribers with k-means clustering, raising win-back campaign conversion by 18%
Junior Analyst — Nielsen, Milano
Sep 2015 - May 2017
• Cleaned and reconciled retail panel data for the Italian FMCG market in SQL and SAS
• Prepared monthly category reviews for two multinational food and beverage clients
Education and training
2013 - 2015 Master of Science in Data Science and Business Informatics, Università di Pisa, 110/110 cum laude
2010 - 2013 Bachelor of Science in Physics, Università di Pisa
2019 Storytelling with Data workshop, two days, Milano
Personal skills and competences
Mother tongue: Italian
Other languages: English (C1, IELTS 7.5), Spanish (B2), French (A2)
Technical: Python, SQL, dbt, BigQuery, Looker, Airflow, scikit-learn, SAS, Git
Soft: public speaking, mentoring, cross-functional collaboration with product and finance teams
Personal interests: sailing, analog photography, beekeeping with my grandfather in Grosseto
